productDisplayName: Peter England Men Elite Cream Tie
description: Dressing the elite for years, peter england has crafted some of the classiest ties from the finest quality microfibre, individually handmade by expert craftsmen weavers in a range of beautiful colours and designs that effortlessly lift your level of sophistication.
